name: Chain No Kizuna
description: A sophisticated Telegram word chain bot built with aiogram, motor, and redis.

VP_TOKEN.description: Virtual Player Bot Token (Optional, get from @BotFather)

MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB connection string (Get from MongoDB Atlas or local DB)

OWNER_ID.description: Your numeric Telegram user ID (Get from @userinfobot)

ADMIN_GROUP_ID.description: ID of the group where admin logs will be sent

OFFICIAL_GROUP_ID.description: ID of the official game group

WORD_ADDITION_CHANNEL_ID.description: ID of the channel where word additions are announced

VIP.description: Comma-separated list of VIP user IDs or JSON list

VIP_GROUP.description: Comma-separated list of VIP group IDs or JSON list
